# Implementation Completeness Checklist: [FEATURE NAME]

**Purpose**: Validate that all spec requirements have been correctly and completely implemented
**Created**: [DATE]
**Feature**: [Link to spec.md and other relevant documentation]

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist.comp` command based on feature spec, contracts, data model, and implementation source code.

## [User Story / Feature Area 1] (US1)

- [ ] CHK001 Is FR-001 fully implemented: [specific requirement details from spec]? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Is FR-002 fully implemented: [specific requirement details]? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK003 Does [component] correctly [behavior from contract]? [Correctness, Contract §TypeName]

## [User Story / Feature Area 2] (US2)

- [ ] CHK004 Is FR-003 fully implemented: [details]? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK005 Does [implementation] match the contract for [interface]? [Correctness, Contract §TypeName]

## Success Criteria Verification

- [ ] CHK006 Is SC-001 testable: [specific success criterion from spec]? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK007 Is SC-002 testable: [specific success criterion]? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK008 Is the [edge case name] handled: [expected behavior from spec]? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK009 Is the [edge case name] handled: [expected behavior]? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Configuration & Validation

- [ ] CHK010 Are all default values correctly set: [list key defaults from spec/data-model]? [Completeness, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK011 Are all validation rules enforced: [list key rules from data-model]? [Completeness, Data Model §Validation Rules]

## Cross-Spec Integration

- [ ] CHK012 Is [dependency from other spec] correctly integrated: [specific integration details]? [Consistency, Spec §FR-XXX]

## DI Wiring & Service Registration

- [ ] CHK013 Are all services registered in [registration method]: [list services]? [Completeness, Tasks §TXXX]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline when an item reveals a gap
- Items reference spec sections (`Spec §FR-XXX`), success criteria (`Spec §SC-XXX`), contracts (`Contract §TypeName`), data model (`Data Model §Section`), or tasks (`Tasks §TXXX`)
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- Traceability: 100% of items include at least one source reference
